pi_items.source: Direct HTTP testing and VitalDB API documentation. URL https://api.vitaldb.net/6 returns 403 Forbidden. Correct format requires .vital extension.
Case 6 total duration is 5145 seconds (85.75 minutes). Target of 1200 seconds is 23.3% into the case, which is reasonable and within bounds.
A 5-minute window (300 seconds) is appropriate for case 6's total duration of 85.75 minutes, allowing approximately 3-7 minutes of data to be visible.
Cannot verify file path independently; this is a claimed output location

privileged_info_summary: Case 6 is a real VitalDB surgical case: 78-year-old female undergoing laparoscopic cholecystectomy for gallbladder polyp at Seoul National University Hospital. The case has a total duration of 85.75 minutes (5145 seconds) with recorded vital signs including BIS monitor data and Primus ventilator parameters. The target time window of 20 minutes (1200 seconds) is 23.3% into the case and well within bounds. A 5-minute zoom window around this time is appropriate for displaying vital sign waveforms during the intraoperative period. The download URL metadata contains an error: the claimed URL (https://api.vitaldb.net/6) returns a 403 Forbidden error; the correct format requires the .vital extension (https://api.vitaldb.net/6.vital or https://api.vitaldb.net/0006.vital).
